examples.title: Fetch Current Comic
examples.description: Fetching the most recent xkcd comic (today's update).
examples.expected_output: ToolResult with rich rendering of the latest xkcd comic index.

examples.title: Get xkcd 1234
examples.description: Fetching a specific xkcd comic by index.
examples.expected_output: ToolResult with rich rendering of comic #1234.

examples.title: Random Comic Discovery
examples.description: Fetching a random surprise xkcd comic from the archive.
examples.user_input: Surprise me with an xkcd comic!
examples.expected_output: ToolResult with a randomly selected comic index.

examples.title: Help and Port Discovery
examples.description: Finding tool information and active ports.
examples.user_input: How do I use the xkcd tools?
examples.expected_output: ToolResult with help text and a rich help card (Ports 10778/10779).

configuration_examples.title: Enable Prefab UI
configuration_examples.description: Explicitly enable rich rendering in the environment.
configuration_examples.user_input: Enable rich cards for xkcd comics

configuration_examples.title: Disable Prefab UI
configuration_examples.description: Switch to plain markdown for low-bandwidth mode.

error_handling_examples.title: Comic Index Out of Range
error_handling_examples.recovery: Suggest checking the current latest comic index.
error_handling_examples.user_action: Verify the correct comic number on xkcd.com.

error_handling_examples.title: Network Error
error_handling_examples.recovery: Retrying with a longer timeout or recommending a manual check.
error_handling_examples.user_action: Ensure the host machine has internet access to xkcd.com.
